TITLE: DuneMap
ADMIN_RIGHTS: You need administrator rights for this command.

PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_GUILD_REQUIRED: You need the **Manage Server** permission for this command!

CHANNELS.CHANNEL_DESCRIPTION: Set the channel for the map

MAP.SHOW_DESCRIPTION: Display the current map with markers
MAP.SET_DESCRIPTION: Set a marker on the map
MAP.REMOVE_DESCRIPTION: Remove a marker from the map
MAP.NO_CHANNEL: No map channel configured! Please set up first with `/dunemap-setup channel`.
MAP.CHANNEL_NOT_FOUND: The configured map channel was not found! Please reset with `/dunemap-setup channel`.

TUTORIAL.DESCRIPTION: Shows a guide for the DuneMap plugin
TUTORIAL.INTRO: Welcome to the DuneMap Plugin! This guide shows you how to use the interactive Deep Desert Map.
TUTORIAL.STEP1_DESC:
Use `/dunemap-setup channel #channel` to set the channel where the map will be displayed.
**Required:** Manage Server permission
TUTORIAL.STEP2_DESC:
Use `/map set <coordinate> <type>` to place markers.
**Example:** `/map set B3 titan`
**Available Types:** Titan, Spice, Stravidium, Base, Wrack, Aluminium, Basalt, Eisen, Karbon, Cave, Hole, Control Point, Taxi, Test
TUTORIAL.STEP3_DESC:
The Coriolis Storm timer is automatically calculated based on your server region.
You can change the region in the Dashboard under DuneMap settings.
**Available Regions:** EU, NA, SA, AS, OCE
TUTORIAL.STEP4_DESC: Use `/map show` to update and post the map with all markers and automatic timer in the configured channel.
TUTORIAL.ADMIN_DESC:
**Remove Marker:** `/map remove <coordinate>`
_Note: You can only remove your own markers. Permanent markers (A1-A9) cannot be deleted._
TUTORIAL.COMMANDS_LIST:
🗺️ `/map show` - Display map
📍 `/map set` - Set marker
🗑️ `/map remove` - Remove marker
⚙️ `/dunemap-setup channel` - Configure channel
❓ `/tutorial` - Show this help
TUTORIAL.FOOTER: DuneBot Map System • Good luck in the Deep Desert!
